name: Crab Newberg
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish and microwave on high until melted (30 seconds to 1 minute).
2. Stir in flour, salt, sherry, milk, and paprika.
3. Blend in the egg yolks.
4. Stir in half and half.
5. Microwave on medium-high until thickened (4 to 7 minutes), stirring with a wire whisk two or three times during cooking.
6. Stir a small amount of hot mixture into the egg yolks; return to the mixture.
7. Microwave on medium-high until thickened again (1 to 3 minutes), stirring once or twice.
8. Stir in crab meat.
9. Serve over toast points or patty shells, if desired.
